No Poverty.reason: The course syllabus contains no explicit or implicit evidence related to poverty eradication, social protection, or economic resources for the poor.

Zero Hunger.reason: There is no evidence in the course description or objectives that relates to ending hunger, improving nutrition, or sustainable agriculture.

Good Health and Well-being.reason: The syllabus does not mention health, well-being, disease prevention, or access to healthcare services.

Quality Education.reason: The course is a Master's program, directly contributing to tertiary education (Target 4.3) and developing professional skills for employment (Target 4.4).
evidence: 習得相關進階專業知識（Students will acquire and apply expertise in their respective fields.）
協助同學發展行銷分析及計畫的能力

Gender Equality.reason: No explicit mention of gender equality, women's empowerment, or eliminating discrimination against women and girls is found in the syllabus.

Clean Water and Sanitation.reason: The course content does not address water quality, sanitation, hygiene, or water resource management.

Affordable and Clean Energy.reason: There is no evidence in the syllabus related to energy access, renewable energy, or energy efficiency.

Decent Work and Economic Growth.reason: The course fosters innovation and entrepreneurial approaches (Target 8.3) and aims to develop skills for economic productivity and growth (Target 8.2).
evidence: 創新方法、創業態度與面對變革的能力（Students can demonstrate innovative, entrepreneurial approaches to manage change.）

Industry, Innovation and Infrastructure.reason: The course's focus on 'New Product Management' and '創新方法、創業態度' directly supports industrial innovation and technological upgrading (Targets 9.5, 9.b).
evidence: 創新方法、創業態度與面對變革的能力

Reduced Inequalities.reason: The syllabus does not contain content related to income inequality, social inclusion, or non-discriminatory policies.

Sustainable Cities and Communities.reason: No evidence in the course material pertains to urban planning, housing, transport, or cultural heritage.

Responsible Consumption and Production.reason: A core competency explicitly requires students to 'understand and be able to identify... sustainability considerations of business situations,' aligning with Target 12.6.
evidence: 理解與辨別商業環境中道德、社會責任與永續議題
Students will understand and be able to identify the ethics, social responsibility, and sustainability considerations of business situations.

Climate Action.reason: The syllabus does not explicitly address climate change, its impacts, or mitigation/adaptation strategies.

Life Below Water.reason: There is no content in the syllabus related to marine ecosystems, ocean pollution, or sustainable fisheries.

Life on Land.reason: The course does not cover terrestrial ecosystems, biodiversity, deforestation, or land degradation.

Peace, Justice and Strong Institutions.reason: The course emphasizes 'ethics and honor' and 'moral, social responsibility' in business, indirectly supporting transparent institutions and reducing corruption (Target 16.5, 16.6).
evidence: 理解與辨別商業環境中道德...議題
本課程嚴格要求道德與榮譽

Partnerships for the Goals.reason: The course explicitly fosters 'teamwork and leadership skills' and 'cooperative learning,' which are foundational for building effective partnerships (Target 17.17).
evidence: 團隊合作與領導能力（Students will be able to work effectively in teams as well as develop leadership skills.）
本課程重視組員間的合作學習
